entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: The geographical region in Africa facing climate variability and agricultural risks

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns affecting the region

entities.name: CLIMATE VARIABILITY
entities.description: Short-term fluctuations in climate patterns that create risks for agriculture

entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART AGRICULTURE
entities.description: An approach integrating technologies and policies to manage climate risks and sustain productivity

entities.name: ADAPTIVE CAPACITY
entities.description: The ability of agricultural systems and farmers to adjust to climate change and variability

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL SYSTEMS
entities.description: The complex interaction of biological and human components in farming

entities.name: FARM PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The output and efficiency of agricultural production

entities.name: LIVELIHOODS
entities.description: The means of securing the necessities of life for agrarian communities

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL YIELDS
entities.description: The amount of crop produced, which is negatively affected by climate change

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: The state of being extremely poor, which is exacerbated by climate change

entities.name: HIGH YIELD
entities.description: The trait of producing a large amount of crop per unit area

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The trait of withstanding periods of low water availability

entities.name: CLIMATE INFORMATION SERVICES
entities.description: The provision of climate data to farmers to help them adapt to variability

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL INSURANCE
entities.description: A financial tool to protect farmers against losses caused by climate-related risks

entities.name: AGROFORESTRY
entities.description: The practice of integrating trees and shrubs into crop and livestock systems

entities.name: WATER HARVESTING
entities.description: Techniques used to collect and store rainwater for agricultural use

entities.name: INTEGRATED SOIL FERTILITY MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Practices aimed at maintaining and improving soil health and nutrient levels

entities.name: MITIGATION
entities.description: Efforts to reduce the emission of greenhouse gases or enhance their sinks to limit climate change

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE POLICIES
entities.description: Governmental plans designed to mitigate climate change and improve adaptive capacity

entities.name: FINANCIAL COMMITMENTS
entities.description: Monetary support from governments and agencies to enable the adoption of climate-smart agriculture
